100% Halal · Open Daily

Authentic India. Downtown Miami.

Bold spices, slow-cooked curries, and the finest biryani in Miami — all served fresh from our kitchen at 109 NE 1st Ave. Halal certified, with vegan and pescatarian options for every guest.

From Our Kitchen

House Favourites

From slow-simmered tarka daal to smoky tandoori straight from the clay oven — every dish is prepared with authentic spices and 100% Halal ingredients.

Signature Biryani

Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender meat, saffron, and whole spices — slow-cooked dum style for maximum depth of flavour

$18 – $22

Tandoori Chicken

Overnight marinated chicken in yoghurt and spices, charred in our traditional clay tandoor oven — smoky, juicy, and deeply aromatic

$16 – $20

Tarka Daal

Silky lentils tempered with cumin, garlic, and dried chillies in golden ghee — a comforting classic that pairs beautifully with fresh naan

$14 – $16

Chicken Kari

Tender chicken pieces in a rich onion-tomato masala with fresh ginger, garlic, and house-ground spices — served with basmati rice or naan

$17 – $21

Vindaloo

A fiery Goan classic — slow-cooked in a bold, tangy sauce of vinegar, red chilli, and warming spices. For the heat seekers in the room

$17 – $21
🍽️

All-You-Can-Eat Lunch Buffet

Daily from 11am — rotating selection of curries, rice, breads, and vegetarian dishes. Great value, generous portions.

$15 per person
Halal Vegan Options Pescatarian
Our Story

Bringing the Heart of Bengal to Downtown Miami

Nestled inside the Mindwarehouse at 109 NE 1st Avenue, Bengal Indian Cuisine has become Downtown Miami's go-to destination for authentic Indian food. We serve 100% Halal food, with an expansive menu that welcomes every guest — from meat lovers to pescatarians and vegans.

Whether you're stopping in for the daily lunch buffet, sharing a biryani with the table, or treating yourself to a full dinner with vindaloo and naan, we bring the warmth and spice of Indian cooking to the heart of the city — seven days a week.

4.4★
Google rating · 1,155+ reviews

What Guests Say

Loved by Miami

Over 1,155 Google reviews and counting. Here is what our guests say after their visit.

★★★★★

"Love this place, great service, polite staff, food is super tasty!! The biryani is absolutely the best I've had in Miami. Will definitely be back."

— Google Review
★★★★★

"We ordered Tarka Daal, Tandoori Chicken, Biryani & Chicken Kari. Every single dish was perfectly spiced and fresh. Incredible value for Downtown Miami."

— Google Review
★★★★★

"The lunch buffet is a hidden gem. So many options and everything is halal. The staff is always welcoming and the food keeps bringing me back every week."

Visit Us

Your Table is Waiting in Downtown Miami

Walk in or reserve ahead. We are open every day from 11am to 10pm at 109 NE 1st Ave, inside the Mindwarehouse.

100% Halal Certified

Every item on our menu is prepared with 100% Halal ingredients — so every guest can eat with confidence and comfort.

Daily Lunch Buffet — 11am

All-you-can-eat from 11am every day. Rotating curries, biryanis, vegetarian dishes, and fresh breads at an unbeatable price.

Something for Everyone

Extensive vegan, vegetarian, and pescatarian options alongside classic meat dishes — an inclusive menu for every table.

Heart of Downtown Miami

Inside Mindwarehouse at 109 NE 1st Ave — steps from Brickell and Miami CBD. Easy to reach, hard to forget.
